findings.description: BASE_URL const declared with hardcoded production fallback URL but never used anywhere in the file. Dead code + e2e-base-url-guard violation.
cleanupAlert is called inline at END of test body, not in afterEach. If test fails mid-way (assertion fails, timeout, etc.), cleanup never runs and artifact persists — same root cause as M-P0-003.
configFields array hardcoded inline inside parseErrorMessage(). Should be a module-level const for reusability and readability.
PresenceBar fix is a display-layer band-aid — root cause (presence backend not counting first heartbeat) unaddressed. Acceptable short-term.
